steps.title: Find the roots
steps.content: By the zero-product property, $3x(x-4)(x+5)=0$ requires one factor to be zero. That gives $x=0$, $x=4$, or $x=-5$.

steps.title: Identify a valid solution
steps.content: Among the choices, $0$ is a root of the equation. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
